calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Paul Weiss (Petitioner/Acting Trustee).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he spoke with the Broker who sold the ARC Trust shares to Dr. Weiss, that there was no indication or evidence that Dr. Weiss wanted the ARC Trust shares to be probated, that the Broker knew Dr. Weiss well (over 20 years), and that the pour over will is in effect to amend the trust and to transfer shares to the trust. Mr. Melbostad also read language in the pour over will, stated that the Beneficiaries are identical, that they were unable to use a small estate affidavit to collect the shares because the amount is slightly over $150,000.00 and that language was inadvertently omitted. In addition, Mr. Melbostad stated that it is very clear that the two Merrill Lynch accounts are sub-accounts of the master account and that they were opened to avoid commissions fees. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
